parameters.jsCode: const docs = $json.result || []; const byCat = new Map(); for (const d of docs) { const key = d.category?._ref || d.category || 'uncat'; if (!byCat.has(key)) byCat.set(key, []); byCat.get(key).push(d); } const out = []; for (const [, list] of byCat.entries()) { for (const item of list) { const links = list.filter(x => x._id !== item._id).slice(0,4).map(x => ({ title: x.title, slug: x.slug?.current || x.slug })); out.push({ json: { articleId: item._id, internalLinks: links } }); } } return out;
